overview.about: The Grand Canyon, carved by the Colorado River over 5–6 million years, stretches 446km long, up to 29km wide and more than 1.6km deep. It exposes nearly two billion years of Earth's geological history in its layered rock walls. Over 5 million visitors make it one of the world's most visited natural wonders.

highlights.label: 1.6km Deep — Earth's Layers Exposed
highlights.desc: Walls reveal 2 billion years of geological history — a textbook of Earth's evolution readable as you descend

highlights.label: Rim-to-River Trekking
highlights.desc: Bright Angel and South Kaibab trails are among North America's most legendary — descend to Phantom Ranch at the base

highlights.label: Sunrise Over South Rim
highlights.desc: Mather Point at dawn produces one of the most jaw-dropping natural light shows witnessed anywhere on the planet

highlights.label: Colorado River Rafting
highlights.desc: Multi-day river rafting trips through the canyon base are among the USA's ultimate adventure experiences

overview.about: Yellowstone National Park in Wyoming, US represents the extraordinary scale and diversity of the American landscape and experience. Whether a natural wonder or historic landmark, this iconic natural wonder destination draws visitors from every continent seeking to experience the energy and grandeur that defines the United States.

highlights.label: Biodiversity Hotspot
highlights.desc: Home to rare and endemic species — flora and fauna found nowhere else on the planet within pristine ecosystems

highlights.label: World-Renowned Trekking
highlights.desc: Trails from leisurely nature walks to multi-day high-altitude expeditions with breathtaking panoramic rewards

highlights.label: Wildlife Encounters
highlights.desc: Spot iconic wildlife in their natural habitat — guided walks dramatically increase sighting rates of rare species

highlights.label: Dramatic Natural Landscapes
highlights.desc: Awe-inspiring vistas of mountains, gorges, waterfalls and geological formations sculpted over millions of years

highlights.label: Iconic Photography Spot
highlights.desc: Panoramic vistas, intricate carvings and sunrise silhouettes that appear on bucket lists worldwide — every angle tells a story

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today
